Operation 'getMessages' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about what 'messages' means (conversation messages), clarified the return type (MessageResource objects), and provided guidance on when to use this operation for AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all messages from the conversation history. Returns a collection of MessageResource objects containing message content, metadata, and timestamps. Use this to access the complete message history for the current dialogue session.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about what 'messages' means (conversation messages), clarified the return type (MessageResource objects), and provided guidance on when to use this operation for AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getHistory' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes 'history' and what is returned. Enhanced to clarify that it includes both user and AI messages, the ordering, return type, and use case for AI agents to understand when to call this versus getMessages.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the full conversation history including all exchanged messages between the user and the AI dialogue system. Returns a chronologically ordered collection of MessageResource objects. This endpoint provides the complete context of the dialogue session for analysis or reference.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes 'history' and what is returned. Enhanced to clarify that it includes both user and AI messages, the ordering, return type, and use case for AI agents to understand when to call this versus getMessages.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all messages that have been explicitly saved by the user for later reference. Returns a collection of MessageResource objects marked with saved status. Useful for accessing bookmarked or important messages from the conversation history.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't clarify that these are user-saved messages (distinct from all messages). Added context about the saved status, return type, and use case to help AI agents understand the distinction between this endpoint and getMessages.

message: Operation 'regenerateMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details. Missing information about what messageId parameter is required, what the return value contains, and that this creates a new message rather than replacing the original. data.current_description: Regenerate a specific AI response message.
data.description_suggestion: Regenerates a specific AI response message by re-running the dialogue engine with the same context. Requires the messageId parameter identifying the response to regenerate. Returns the newly generated MessageResource object. The original message is preserved; a new response is created and added to the conversation history.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details. Missing information about what messageId parameter is required, what the return value contains, and that this creates a new message rather than replacing the original. Added these details for complete AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Save a specific message response for later reference.
data.description_suggestion: Marks a specific message response as saved for later reference. Requires the messageId parameter identifying the message to save. Returns the updated MessageResource object with saved status. This operation persists the saved state and makes the message retrievable via getSavedMessages endpoint.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks input parameter details, return value information, and side effects. Added specification of required messageId parameter, return type, and clarification that this persists state and affects getSavedMessages results.

data.current_description: Remove a message from saved responses.

data.current_description: Register a webhook URL for New Dialogue events (used by Zapier triggers).
data.summary_suggestion: Register webhook URL for New Dialogue events
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive New Dialogue events for Zapier integration. Accepts a WebhookRequest containing the target webhook URL. The webhook will be triggered for dialogue events and message updates. Returns confirmation of the registered webhook. Only one webhook can be active at a time; registering a new webhook replaces any previously configured webhook.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses passive voice and lacks action clarity. Description missing critical details: what the WebhookRequest contains, what events trigger the webhook, what is returned, and the behavior when registering multiple webhooks. Enhanced version clarifies inputs, outputs, and side effects (replacement behavior) for better AI agent decision-making.
